creator: phlatlyn@pacbell.net
text:
System will not install. System has DTC3290 EISA scsi adapter,3com
3c597 EISA 100BaseT nad matrox impression PCI vga adapter.(also tried
with Triden TVGA8900 ISA VGA) on Micronics P5Me motherboard (bios is
revison 6.SYstem has 16 megs of ram and Seagate 43400 SCSI hard
disk.After error message system reboots.Open BSD and net BSD also have
similar problems.Open BSD hangs,net BSD drops me to a debugger.

Fix: 

Seems to work ok if hard disk is disconnected. (however,I do not have
another disk on the machine to install it on,but it at least gets past
that point)
How-To-Repeat: Any time install is run
